  1. org.key_project.logic
  2. LogicServices

Uses of Interface
org.key_project.logic.LogicServices

Packages that use LogicServices
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.executor
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort
This package contains different kinds and implementations subtyping interface Sort.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof
This package contains the core data structures of proofs, nodes, goals, as well as machinery to deal with these data structures.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt
This package contains classes for proof environments and proof management.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
This package contains classes for implementing rules.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.executor.javadl
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst
contains classes for the instantiation of schema variables of Taclets.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm.instructions
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.termfeature
 
org.key_project.logic.sort
 
org.key_project.prover.indexing
 
org.key_project.prover.proof
 
org.key_project.prover.rules
 
org.key_project.prover.rules.instantiation
 
org.key_project.prover.rules.matcher.vm
 
org.key_project.prover.rules.matcher.vm.instruction
 
org.key_project.prover.strategy.costbased.termfeature
 

  • Uses of LogicServices in de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.executor

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.executor with parameters of type LogicServices
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    InfFlowContractAppTacletExecutor.addToAntec(Semisequent semi, SequentChangeInfo currentSequent, PosInOccurrence pos, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull Goal goal, @NonNull TacletApp tacletApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
    adds SequentFormula to antecedent depending on position information (if none is handed over it is added at the head of the antecedent).

  • Uses of LogicServices in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule with parameters of type LogicServices
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final MatchResultInfo
    VariableConditionAdapter.check(SchemaVariable var, SyntaxElement instCandidate, MatchResultInfo mc, LogicServices services)
     
    NoPosTacletApp
    NoPosTacletApp.matchFind(PosInOccurrence pos, LogicServices services)
    PRECONDITION:
    TacletApp
    NoPosTacletApp.setMatchConditions(MatchResultInfo mc, LogicServices services)
    creates a new Taclet application containing all the instantiations, constraints and new metavariables given by the mc object and forget the old ones
    TacletApp
    PosTacletApp.setMatchConditions(MatchResultInfo mc, LogicServices services)
    creates a new Taclet application containing all the instantiations, constraints and new metavariables given by the mc object and forget the old ones
    abstract TacletApp
    TacletApp.setMatchConditions(MatchResultInfo mc, LogicServices services)
    creates a new Taclet application containing all the instantiations, constraints and new metavariables given by the mc object and forget the old ones

    a new term is created by replacing variables of term whose replacement is found in the given SVInstantiations

  • Uses of LogicServices in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst with parameters of type LogicServices
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SVInstantiations
    SVInstantiations.add(PosInProgram prefix, PosInProgram postfix, ExecutionContext activeStatementContext, ProgramElement pe, LogicServices services)
    adds the given pair to the instantiations for the context.If the context has been instantiated already, the new pair is taken without a warning.
    @NonNull SVInstantiations
    SVInstantiations.add(GenericSortCondition p_c, LogicServices services)
    Add the given additional condition for the generic sort instantiations
    SVInstantiations
    SVInstantiations.add(SchemaVariable sv, SyntaxElement matchedElement, LogicServices services)
    adds the given pair to the instantiations.
    SVInstantiations
    SVInstantiations.add(SchemaVariable sv, InstantiationEntry<?> entry, LogicServices services)
    adds the given pair to the instantiations.
    <T> SVInstantiations
    SVInstantiations.add(SchemaVariable sv, ImmutableArray<T> pes, Class<T> type, LogicServices services)
     
    SVInstantiations
    SVInstantiations.addInteresting(SchemaVariable sv, Name name, LogicServices services)
     
    SVInstantiations
    SVInstantiations.addInteresting(SchemaVariable sv, SyntaxElement subst, LogicServices services)
     
    SVInstantiations
    SVInstantiations.addInteresting(SchemaVariable sv, InstantiationEntry<?> entry, LogicServices services)

    GenericSortInstantiations.create(Iterator<ImmutableMapEntry<SchemaVariable, InstantiationEntry<?>>> p_instantiations, ImmutableList<GenericSortCondition> p_conditions, LogicServices services)
    Create an object that solves the conditions given by the instantiation iterator, i.e.
    static GenericSortInstantiations
    GenericSortInstantiations.create(ImmutableList<GenericSort> p_sorts, ImmutableList<GenericSortCondition> p_conditions, LogicServices services)
    Create an object that holds instantiations of the generic sorts "p_sorts" satisfying the conditions "p_conditions"
    JTerm
    SVInstantiations.getTermInstantiation(SchemaVariable sv, ExecutionContext ec, LogicServices services)
    returns the instantiation of the given SchemaVariable as Term.
    SVInstantiations
    SVInstantiations.makeInteresting(SchemaVariable sv, LogicServices services)
    adds the schemvariable to the set of interesting ones
    @NonNull SVInstantiations
    SVInstantiations.union(@NonNull SVInstantiations p_other, @NonNull LogicServices services)

  • Uses of LogicServices in org.key_project.prover.rules

    Methods in org.key_project.prover.rules with parameters of type LogicServices
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    TacletExecutor.addToAntec(Semisequent semi, SequentChangeInfo currentSequent, PosInOccurrence pos, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, MatchResultInfo matchCond, Goal goal, App tacletApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
    adds SequentFormula to antecedent depending on position information (if none is handed over it is added at the head of the antecedent).
    protected void
    TacletExecutor.addToPos(Semisequent semi, SequentChangeInfo currentSequent, PosInOccurrence pos, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, boolean antec, MatchResultInfo matchCond, Goal goal, App tacletApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
    instantiates the formulas of semisequent semi and adds the instantiated formulas at the specified position to goal
    protected void
    TacletExecutor.addToSucc(Semisequent semi, SequentChangeInfo currentSequent, PosInOccurrence pos, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, MatchResultInfo matchCond, Goal goal, App ruleApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
    adds SequentFormula to succedent depending on position information (if none is handed over it is added at the head of the succedent).
    protected abstract void
    TacletExecutor.applyAddProgVars(ImmutableSet<SchemaVariable> pvs, SequentChangeInfo currentSequent, Goal goal, PosInOccurrence posOfFind, LogicServices services, MatchResultInfo matchCond)
     
    protected abstract void
    TacletExecutor.applyAddrule(ImmutableList<? extends Taclet> rules, Goal goal, LogicServices services, MatchResultInfo matchCond)
    adds the given rules (i.e. the rules to add according to the Taclet goal template to the node of the given goal)
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    VariableCondition.check(@Nullable SchemaVariable var, @Nullable SyntaxElement instCandidate, @NonNull MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
    checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    TacletMatcher.checkConditions(@Nullable MatchResultInfo matchResultInfo, @NonNull LogicServices services)
    Checks the given match result against the taclet's variable conditions.
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    TacletMatcher.checkVariableConditions(@Nullable SchemaVariable var, @Nullable SyntaxElement instantiationCandidate, @Nullable MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
    Checks whether a schema variable can be instantiated with the given candidate term, under the provided match conditions.
    protected SequentFormula
    TacletExecutor.instantiateReplacement(SequentFormula schemaFormula, LogicServices services, MatchResultInfo matchCond, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, Goal goal, App tacletApp, Object... instantiationInfo)
    The given formula is instantiated and then the result (usually a complete instantiated formula) is returned.
    protected ImmutableList<SequentFormula>
    TacletExecutor.instantiateSemisequent(Semisequent semi, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, MatchResultInfo matchCond, Goal goal, App tacletApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
    instantiates the given semisequent with the instantiations found in the match results
    @NonNull AssumesMatchResult
    TacletMatcher.matchAssumes(@NonNull Iterable<@NonNull AssumesFormulaInstantiation> toMatch, @NonNull Term template, @NonNull MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
    Matches a template formula (typically from the "assumes" part of a taclet) against a list of constraint formulas (e.g., from a sequent's antecedent or succedent), using the given initial match conditions.
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    TacletMatcher.matchAssumes(@NonNull Iterable<AssumesFormulaInstantiation> toMatch, @NonNull MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
    Matches a list of formula instantiations against the full "assumes" sequent of a taclet, starting with the given initial match conditions.
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    TacletMatcher.matchFind(@NonNull Term term, @NonNull MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
    Attempts to match the given term against the taclet's "find" term.
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    TacletMatcher.matchSV(SchemaVariable sv, SyntaxElement se, MatchResultInfo matchCond, LogicServices services)
    Matches a schema variable to a syntax element under the given match conditions.
    protected void
    TacletExecutor.replaceAtPos(Semisequent semi, SequentChangeInfo currentSequent, PosInOccurrence pos, MatchResultInfo matchCond, Goal goal, App ruleApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
    Replaces the formula at the given position with the first formula in the given semisequent and adds possible other formulas of the semisequent starting at the position.
    protected abstract Term
    TacletExecutor.syntacticalReplace(Term term, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, MatchResultInfo mc, Goal goal, App ruleApp, LogicServices services, Object... args)
    a new term is created by replacing variables of term whose replacement is found in the given SVInstantiations

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SVInstantiations
    SVInstantiations.union(SVInstantiations other, LogicServices services)
    returns a new SVInstantiations object that contains all instantiations contained in this and the other SVInstantiations object

  • Uses of LogicServices in org.key_project.prover.rules.matcher.vm.instruction

    Methods in org.key_project.prover.rules.matcher.vm.instruction with parameters of type LogicServices
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    CheckNodeKindInstruction.match(SyntaxElement actualElement, MatchResultInfo matchConditions, LogicServices services)
    Checks whether the given SyntaxElement is an instance of the expected type.
    MatchResultInfo
    GotoNextInstruction.match(PoolSyntaxElementCursor cursor, MatchResultInfo matchConditions, LogicServices services)
    Advances the cursor to the next syntax element.
    MatchResultInfo
    GotoNextSiblingInstruction.match(PoolSyntaxElementCursor cursor, MatchResultInfo matchConditions, LogicServices services)
    Moves the cursor to the next sibling of the current syntax element.
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    MatchIdentityInstruction.match(SyntaxElement actualElement, MatchResultInfo matchConditions, LogicServices services)
    Performs the identity check between the provided actualElement and the internally stored syntaxElement.
    default @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    MatchInstruction.match(PoolSyntaxElementCursor cursor, MatchResultInfo matchResultInfo, LogicServices services)
    Default implementation of the matching operation defined by VMInstruction.
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    MatchInstruction.match(SyntaxElement actualElement, MatchResultInfo matchConditions, LogicServices services)
    Executes the matching operation against the specified SyntaxElement, without using or altering the cursor.
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    VMInstruction.match(PoolSyntaxElementCursor cursor, MatchResultInfo matchResultInfo, LogicServices services)
    Executes the matching operation defined by this instruction.
